calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-10-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: settlement conf held. settled off the record: restitution of 34 sixth st. #335 SF., Ca. agreement forfeited, stayed to 11-1-02 @5pm, pltf receives nothing for damages, if deft does not vacate, pltf to receive $15 per day from 5-1-02 thru 11-15-02 and $191 for costs, no attorney fees-total of $2,685. each party waives any claim, any personal property left is deemed abandoned. judge pro temp, larry becker;clerk, t.maruyama.
